messages.speaker: Agent
messages.text: Thank you for calling Wells Fargo, my name is Sarah. How may I assist you today?

messages.speaker: Customer
messages.text: Hi Sarah. Um, I'm calling because I just looked at my credit card statement online and there's a charge there I definitely didn't make. I'm a bit worried about it.

messages.speaker: Agent
messages.text: I understand that can be concerning, ma'am. I'm here to help. To ensure I'm speaking with the authorized account holder and to pull up your account securely, could you please verify your full name, the last four digits of your credit card number, and your billing zip code?

messages.speaker: Customer
messages.text: Okay, yes. My name is Elizabeth Chen. The last four are 1234, and my zip code is 90210. The charge, it's for $349.99 from something called 'Tech Hub Online'. I've never heard of them.

messages.speaker: Agent
messages.text: Thank you, Ms. Chen. I see the transaction you're referring to, dated November 12th. Based on what you've told me, it sounds like an unauthorized charge. I'm going to initiate a dispute for you right away.

messages.speaker: Customer
messages.text: Oh, okay. Thank you. So, what happens now? Will I get that money back? And... is my card still active? Should I be worried about more charges?

messages.speaker: Agent
messages.text: Those are excellent questions, Ms. Chen. First, once the dispute is formally submitted, we will typically issue a provisional credit to your account for the disputed amount within 5 to 10 business days while we investigate. Secondly, yes, for your security, we will need to cancel your current card number to prevent any further fraudulent activity. A new card will be mailed to you.

messages.speaker: Customer
messages.text: Okay, that makes sense. So I'll get a new card. How long does that usually take to arrive? And how will I know if the investigation is complete?

messages.speaker: Agent
messages.text: Your new card should arrive by mail within 7 to 10 business days. It will have a new number and expiration date, but your PIN will remain the same unless you choose to change it. Regarding the investigation, it typically takes up to 90 days, but we will notify you by mail of the final outcome and any necessary updates.

messages.speaker: Customer
messages.text: Alright. That's a relief. So, I just need to wait for the provisional credit and then the new card. And keep an eye out for mail from you. Thank you, Sarah, I really appreciate your help. I was pretty stressed out about this.

messages.speaker: Agent
messages.text: You're most welcome, Ms. Chen. I'm glad I could assist. Is there anything else I can help you with regarding your Wells Fargo accounts today?

messages.speaker: Customer
messages.text: No, that's everything for now. Thanks again.
